authority: V44 composes the complete V42 connected frontier, the V43 exact cycle-rank law and the V40 complete paired-state fixed-point descent; it retains every distinct fixed point and does not choose from target measurements.

composition.connected_parent: all three sealed V42 connected whole-chain rows
composition.cycle_relation: V43 exact independent-cycle rank descended by integer distance to the theorem-forced One
composition.update_space: all 576 paired 24-lattice states at every active residue
composition.termination: strict finite fixed point after a complete unchanged sweep

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: V42 supplies connected parents, V43 supplies the exact cycle-rank identity and theorem-forced One, and V40 supplies complete paired-state fixed-point descent.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: Every one of the three connected parents executes every one of the 576 paired states at every active residue until a complete sweep changes no state.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: Neither the connected parent frontier nor one paired lattice alone supplies their complete Cartesian update space; the engine checks their product as the minimal named assembly.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Connectivity is preserved as the V42 invariant; inside it, exact integer distance to the unique cycle target One precedes the unchanged V3 total order.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Only sealed V42/V43 relations, sequence and generated geometry enter; native coordinates, TM, dRMSD and mask measurements are absent.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Runtime halts on parent, source, count, direction, connectivity, monotonicity, fixed-point, target-input or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: The complete L76 fixed-point frontier is emitted and sealed before every retained structure is compared.
